questions.question: 将物体 ? (? 个顶点) 投影到 yz 平面 (丢弃 x 轴)。投影后是否存在两个原本不同的顶点重合到同一像点？

options.A: 投影后顶点数变多，因为出现新交点
options.B: 无法投影，因为该方向上物体退化
options.C: 不存在顶点碰撞（所有顶点的投影互不相同）
options.D: 存在顶点碰撞（至少两顶点投影后重合）

counterfactual.explanation: No-projection identity preserves 100% of distances vs projection's 43%. Critical: dimension reduction is the cause of information loss.
Deduping collided points: 8 -> 4 points, crossings 8 -> 0. Critical: collisions encode 3D structure that dedupe destroys.
Partial squash (×0.5) preserves 43% vs full projection's 43%; collisions 4 -> 0. Critical: zeroing the axis is strictly more lossy than scaling.
